# landscape_distribution (Resource)

Manages a Landscape repository distribution (the top-level container for series and pockets).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Unique name for the distribution. Must start with an alphanumeric character and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, `-`, or `+`.

### Optional

- `access_group` (String) Access group to create the distribution in. Defaults to `global`.
